summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'aisle & after' dating app - iteration 4. All backend APIs pass (14/14). All frontend features working correctly with consistent tech-forward minimalist design. AI endpoints return fallback starters (expected due to low Anthropic credits). Stripe checkout opens in new tab correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check (/api/) - returns healthy status
Backend: Guest login (alice@demo.com/demo123) - returns token and user
Backend: Host login (testhost@demo.com/demo123) - returns token with is_host=true
Backend: Invalid credentials - returns 401
Backend: /auth/me with token - returns user data
Backend: /ai/conversation-starters with match_id d0942c71-bfcd-427e-a285-42fafc2a099c - returns 3 fallback starters (200 OK)
Backend: /ai/compatibility with same match_id - returns analysis text (200 OK)
Backend: Invalid match_id - returns 403 forbidden
Backend: /payments/check for host - returns has_paid boolean and price
Backend: /payments/checkout for host - returns checkout_url and session_id
Backend: /payments/checkout for guest - returns 403 forbidden
Backend: /events/current - returns event data
Backend: /matches - returns matches list
Backend: /chat/{match_id} - returns messages
Frontend: Landing page loads with logo, event code input, join button
Frontend: Login flow works - alice@demo.com/demo123 redirects to /discover
Frontend: Matches page loads with card-modern class (rounded design), floating nav, noise-bg
Frontend: Chat page loads with glass-header, rounded message input, AI starters button (wand icon)
Frontend: AI conversation starters - clicking wand icon returns 3 fallback starters
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads for host with rounded cards (card-modern), glass-header
Frontend: Stripe payment button opens checkout.stripe.com in new tab (NOT blank page)
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo accounts from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly. AI endpoints return fallback starters due to low Anthropic API credits - this is expected behavior and not a bug. Stripe checkout opens in new tab as intended. All three redesigned pages (MatchesPage, ChatPage, AdminDashboard) have consistent tech-forward design with card-modern, glass-header, noise-bg, and floating pill nav.

notes.ai_behavior: AI endpoints (/ai/conversation-starters, /ai/compatibility) return fallback responses due to low Anthropic credits. Endpoints return 200 OK with fallback content, not 500 errors - this is the expected graceful degradation behavior.
notes.stripe_behavior: Stripe payment button opens checkout.stripe.com in a new tab using window.open() - this fixes the previous blank page issue in the preview environment.
notes.design_consistency: All pages follow the tech-forward minimalist black-and-white aesthetic with serif/sans font pairing, rounded elements, and glass effects.
